rationale: Educ. Code §31.003 governs SBOE and commissioner rulemaking authority for instructional materials. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The State Board of Education may adopt rules, consistent with this chapter, for the adoption, requisition, distribution, care, use, and disposal of instructional materials.
_note: No jurisdictional or subject-matter overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional materials rulemaking statute.
